target: outreach/ (top-level folder in this repo; Python 3.12; fully separate codebase from the Astro site)
enquiries_table: EXTERNAL / READ-ONLY — created and written by the website's enquiry Edge Function. This loop NEVER creates, alters, or writes it; phase A migrates everything EXCEPT enquiries; check_suppression() reads it.
green_rule: A phase is GREEN only when verify.sh (floor) exits 0 AND the separate judge agent returns PASS.

phases.name: Foundations
phases.summary: Scaffold outreach/; service-role Supabase connection; schema migration; per-lead state machine + audit_log writer; LLMProvider interface.
builds: outreach/ Python package + pyproject/requirements; outreach/.env (gitignored); add outreach/.env, .venv, __pycache__ to root .gitignore; add outreach/ to .vercelignore
migration creating: leads, enrichment, drafts, sends, replies, suppressions, audit_log (NOT enquiries) + enums lead_state, subscriber_class
drafts MUST have BOTH body_original (immutable AI draft) AND body_final (after human edit)
lead state machine + audit_log writer
LLMProvider interface with inline (default) + api implementations, both callable
green: outreach package imports; migration file present & applied
service-role DB connection ok
enums lead_state + subscriber_class present
drafts table has both body_original and body_final columns
state-transition + audit_log unit tests pass (pytest -m floor_a)

phases.name: find_leads
phases.summary: Companies House Advanced Search → estate agents (SIC 68310), active only; page via start_index; dedupe on company_number; write state=discovered.
builds: CH Advanced Search client (env COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY): company_status=active, sic_codes=68310
pagination via start_index; dedupe on company_number; rate-limit guard (<600 req / 5 min; build cap <=50 req/run)
write discovered leads with valid fields
green: >=30 real leads in Supabase with valid company_number + company_name, state=discovered
dedupe proven (count = count(distinct company_number))
rate-limit respected (throttle guard test passes, pytest -m floor_b)

phases.name: Compliance firewall (PECR)
phases.summary: Legal-structure classifier corporate/individual/unknown; individual OR unknown -> HARD suppressed; check_suppression consults suppressions UNION enquiries; audit_log row per lead.
builds: classifier from company_type -> subscriber_class (corporate | individual | unknown)
individual|unknown -> hard-move state=suppressed, reason 'PECR individual subscriber', never contactable
check_suppression(email, domain, company_number) over suppressions AND enquiries (never cold-contact an existing enquirer)
audit_log row per lead: source + lawful_basis='legitimate interests' + classification reason
green: classifier fixtures classify correctly (pytest -m floor_c)
0 individual|unknown leads in any contactable state
a seeded enquirer email is correctly suppressed
every lead has an audit_log row with lawful_basis='legitimate interests'

phases.name: enrich_company
phases.summary: Discover website; scrape homepage + about/contact; find contact email (prefer generic); verify via MillionVerifier (tiny sample); LLM 'signal' via inline provider; discard unverifiable.
builds: website discovery + homepage/about/contact scrape (httpx)
contact-email finder (prefer info@/contact@)
MillionVerifier verification (env; tiny sample only, <=20/run)
LLM 'signal' summary via inline LLMProvider
discard unverifiable (no contactable lead with an unverifiable email)
green: sample leads enriched (website + signal present)
>=1 contact email verified
no contactable lead retains an unverifiable email (pytest -m floor_d)

phases.name: draft_email (MECHANISM ONLY)
phases.summary: Build the drafting stage + reviewer + loader for editable prompts/draft_email.md, which is an EXPLICITLY-MARKED PLACEHOLDER pending the deferred drafting playbook. Enforce the structural/compliance envelope. Do NOT author conversion copy.
builds: load outreach/prompts/draft_email.md (verbatim placeholder from CONTEXT.md — the loop must NOT invent copy)
produce a draft into body_original via the inline provider
structural/compliance reviewer enforcing the envelope below
green: prompts/draft_email.md exists and is clearly marked PLACEHOLDER
draft loads from the playbook file; written to body_original
plain UK English under 125 words
contains a plain-text unsubscribe line + clear SettlePay sender ID
references 'FCA-regulated partners' (never SettlePay's own authorisation)
ZERO links and ZERO images
judge confirms placeholder clearly marked and NO conversion strategy invented by the loop

phases.name: Approval queue
phases.summary: Drafts land in awaiting_approval; minimal review surface to approve/edit/reject. Edit -> body_final + reviewer_note (body_original intact); approve-without-edit copies body_original -> body_final. ONLY approved drafts advance.
builds: awaiting_approval state + minimal review surface (CLI list / approve / edit / reject)
edit writes revised text to body_final + reviewer_note, leaving body_original intact
approve-without-edit copies body_original -> body_final
recorded human decision required before advancing
green: end-to-end on samples (pytest -m floor_f)
edits captured as body_original + body_final + reviewer_note
nothing advances past approval without a recorded human decision
no approved/sent draft has an empty body_final

phases.name: send (Gmail API) — HARD-GATED, OFF by default
phases.summary: send_email (sends body_final) wrapped in check_suppression + per-inbox daily cap + individual-subscriber block + global kill switch. Live sending DISABLED behind gate G-SEND; dry-run / test mailbox only until cleared.
builds: send_email via Gmail API (per-user OAuth + refresh token) from a SEPARATE Google Workspace secondary domain (e.g. getsettlepay.uk), never @settlepay.uk
guards: check_suppression before send, per-inbox daily cap (3-5), individual-subscriber block, global kill switch
live send REFUSES while G_SEND env unset; dry-run / test mailbox only
green: send path works against a TEST mailbox in dry-run (pytest -m floor_g)
live send refuses while G_SEND unset; G_SEND is NOT set by the loop
0 live sends recorded during build (sends.mode = dry_run only)
all guardrails enforced in dry-run (suppression, cap, individual block, kill switch)

phases.name: Operational wiring
phases.summary: Single `python -m outreach run --stage all` advancing every lead one step per tick (cron- and /loop-friendly). Cadence/follow-up/send-windows CONFIG-DRIVEN via sequence_config (TBD from playbook — do NOT hardcode). Graduation thresholds encoded; kill switch wired.
builds: python -m outreach run --stage all entrypoint (advances each lead one step per tick; --dry-run)
sequence_config drives ALL timing (cadence, follow-up delays, send windows) — values TBD from the deferred playbook; NO hardcoded delays
graduation thresholds encoded (>=50 reviewed drafts/vertical, >=90-95% approved unedited, <2% bounce, zero complaint spike -> per-vertical auto-send, guardrails permanently on, 1-in-20 spot check)
kill switch wired
green: pipeline advances leads one step per tick in dry-run (pytest -m floor_h; `python -m outreach run --stage all --dry-run` exits 0)
sequence_config drives timing — no hardcoded delay literals in the codebase
graduation thresholds present in config
kill switch present
